dataQualityNotes: Activity and volume are computed from public on-chain lifecycle events.
Dashboard trader rows use platform account addresses from lifecycle events; handles and private labels are not joined.
Estimated from Euphoria on-chain lifecycle account cashflows: platform settlement payouts minus observed stakes. This is not audited wallet cashflow PnL.
Estimated from Euphoria on-chain lifecycle settlement payouts to platform accounts. This matches the current leaderboard scale but is not net account PnL.
Audited real wallet PnL remains internal until cashflow identity across external funding rails is separately audited.
Legacy transfer cursor completeness is reported separately from lifecycle dashboard completeness.
metadata.leaderboardPayoutMethodology: Estimated from Euphoria on-chain lifecycle settlement payouts to platform accounts. This matches the current leaderboard scale but is not net account PnL.
